title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Policy-controlled settings from Lens Cloud are locked and non-editable in Poly Studio Mobile app with a dialog indicating the setting cannot be changed
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the target Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Apply a policy configuration via Lens Cloud (e.g., disable ANC toggle, lock Equalizer, or restrict Transparency Mode).
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the policy-controlled setting (e.g., Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer).
6. Observe the UI state of the policy-controlled setting.
7. Attempt to modify the policy-controlled setting (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, change EQ preset).
expected: The policy-controlled setting is displayed as locked/greyed out and non-editable. When the user attempts to modify it, a dialog appears indicating the setting cannot be changed because it is controlled by an administrator/policy.
